creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 170252
Patch in postgis/lwgeom_accu.c

It seems that the suggestions of the compiler (CLANG 3.8) were correct: The struct AggState does not have a member context, but contexts!

Attached, you'll find a patchset which I applied successfully to postgis21, so it works for now. But 2.1 is outdated, as postgis 2.2.2 seems to be state of the art now. I do not know how to handle this, it seems an upstream proplem.
